instances.task_instruction:
You are solving a PC build configuration task. Fill the 5x2 grid with component ids.
This PC build task has 5 build configurations as rows and 2 component slots within each configuration as columns.
Each cell must use exactly one candidate id from that slot.

Across the whole grid, the plan must satisfy these global constraints:
(1) the total price of all components in the whole grid must be at most 10090.
(2) the total power of all components in the whole grid must be at most 2218.
(3) the same brand can appear at most 5 times in the whole grid.
(4) the same category can appear at most 4 times in the whole grid.

For the row constraints:
For build track 0:
(1) the total price of all components in build track 0 must be at most 2131.
(2) the total power of all components in build track 0 must be at most 504.
(3) the total performance of all components in build track 0 must be at least 129.

For build track 1:
(1) the total price of all components in build track 1 must be at most 2112.
(2) the total power of all components in build track 1 must be at most 770.
(3) the total performance of all components in build track 1 must be at least 86.

For build track 2:
(1) the total price of all components in build track 2 must be at most 1704.
(2) the total power of all components in build track 2 must be at most 357.
(3) the total performance of all components in build track 2 must be at least 130.

For build track 3:
(1) the total price of all components in build track 3 must be at most 2615.
(2) the total power of all components in build track 3 must be at most 254.
(3) the total performance of all components in build track 3 must be at least 133.

For build track 4:
(1) the total price of all components in build track 4 must be at most 2262.
(2) the total power of all components in build track 4 must be at most 280.
(3) the total performance of all components in build track 4 must be at least 36.

For the column constraints:
For component slot 0:
(1) the total price of all components in component slot 0 must be at most 4348.
(2) the total power of all components in component slot 0 must be at most 901.
(3) the maximum compatibility of any component in component slot 0 must be at most 96.

For component slot 1:
(1) the total price of all components in component slot 1 must be at most 5585.
(2) the total power of all components in component slot 1 must be at most 931.
(3) the maximum compatibility of any component in component slot 1 must be at most 100.

Each slot also has its own local constraints, but those slot-specific limits must be looked up from the dataset/database for that slot before deciding which candidate id to use.
Return only a 5x2 list of component ids.
